videos.title: The hivemind has a new leader.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena gameplay with Sliver Overlord as commander in Brawl. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
01:30 - Deck Tech
08:00 - vs Imskir Iron-Eater
18:45 - vs Saruman of Many Colors
28:24 - vs Pantlaza, Sun-Favored
39:35 - vs Ulalek, Fused Atrocity
45:29 - vs Kotis, the Fangkeeper
49:03 - vs Tannuk, Steadfast Second

Decklist:
